3237580.name: color drop
3237580.description:
Got an itch for the meditative flow of games like Tetris and Lumines? Look no further than color drop! Get lost in this block-dropping, color matching action puzzler, that's perfect for losing hours chasing 'S' ranks or keeping your mind and reflexes sharp when you have a few minutes to kill. 

In color drop, you move, rotate, and drop multi-colored blocks into a grid, attempting to keep blocks of the same color together. After some time, one of the pieces will contain a bomb! Bomb's clear all connected blocks of the same color. Clear 5 or more blocks and you'll get another bomb, allowing you to continue your combo. Do this once more, and you'll achieve a rainbow!

color drop has three modes:

  • 40 block clear: Get the highest score you can in 40 blocks!

  • Time Attack:  Get the highest score you can in 3 minutes!

  • Survival: Play as long as you can while dealing with ever-fasting dropping blocks

Currently, color drop has 4 themes you can play in any mode:

  • Light theme - Features primary-colored blocks in a minimal, bright environment.

  • Dark Theme - Secondary colors are used in a darker environment.

  • Ocean Theme - Stack blocks at the bottom of the ocean!

  • City Theme - Chase scores in the heart of downtown!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
